calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: David Yang; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff representative, Vince Alvarenga for the John Stewart Company is present.
Attorney, John Zanghi, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Davina Singleton is present.
Attorney, Derek Biafore, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a Stipulation for Entry of Judgment and Judgment, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed Stipulation and Judgment for the premises located at 103 Rosa Parks Lane, San Francisco, California.

The case is settled. The trial date of SEP-08-2009 is vacated.
